name: ctfpwn
description: CTF autopwn module — syncs github.com/0xb0rn3/CTFs, lists all rooms by platform, runs standalone exploitation scripts for TryHackMe and HackTheBox, auto-extracts flags, saves output to ~/ZX01C/CTF/<room>/
author: dezthejackal | 0xb0rn3

optional_dependencies.nmap: Port scanning — used by most autopwn scripts
optional_dependencies.gobuster: Directory enumeration — used by web-based CTF scripts
optional_dependencies.sshpass: Automated SSH login — used by privilege escalation scripts
optional_dependencies.hydra: Brute force — used by some rooms

help.description: Pulls the latest autopwn scripts from 0xb0rn3/CTFs, presents them in a structured list, and runs them against a target machine. Supports TryHackMe and HackTheBox rooms. Automatically detects the latest added CTF, extracts flags from output, and saves everything to ~/ZX01C/CTF/<room>/

examples: list   — list all CTFs sorted newest first
pull   — clone/update repo + sync all rooms to ~/ZX01C/CTF/
latest — show newest CTF; run its script if target IP provided
run    — run a specific room's autopwn against target IP
info   — show README/writeup for a room
search — full-text search across room names, writeups, scripts
new    — show rooms added to the repo since the last pull

ctf.description: Room name for run/info operations (case-insensitive, partial match supported)

query.description: Search term for 'search' operation — searched across room names, writeups, and scripts

examples.description: Show latest CTF and auto-run if target provided
Run a specific room's autopwn script
Show README / writeup for a room
Search for rooms with sudo privilege escalation

notes: Repo is cloned to ~/.secv/ctfs/ on first use and pulled on every subsequent run
All room files are mirrored to ~/ZX01C/CTF/<room_name>/ during pull
Flags are automatically extracted from output (THM{}, HTB{}, flag{} patterns)
Scripts accept <target_ip> as first positional argument
Connect to the platform VPN before running any script
search scans room names, README writeups, AND the exploit scripts themselves

operation.description: list | pull | latest | run | info | search

ctf.description: Room name for run/info (case-insensitive, partial match)

findings.description: Per-operation results: room metadata, run log path, extracted flags
